description_long: This shotgun features a robust, industrial design with a predominantly blue metal body accented by black and metallic components. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a visible vented rib running along the top, and the fore-end appears reinforced with additional metalwork. The stock is minimalistic, resembling a skeletal or wireframe structure, and the trigger assembly is exposed with a rounded, open trigger guard. There are visible mechanical parts near the action, including a pump mechanism and exposed tubing or wiring, suggesting a utilitarian, possibly modified or custom-built firearm. The overall finish is matte with signs of wear, and the object has a rugged, functional appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A rugged, blue metal shotgun with a long vented barrel, exposed pump mechanism, and a skeletal stock, showing signs of wear and industrial design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blue barrel, exposed pump, and skeletal stock with visible mechanical details.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow profile, vented barrel rib, and the alignment of the stock and barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the pump mechanism and metallic components.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the skeletal stock and the alignment of the barrel and action, with the trigger guard visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a vented rib along the top; long barrel with no visible side-by-side or over-under configuration
attribute_stock_type: no stock (skeletal wireframe or minimalistic rear structure)
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, open trigger guard with a thin, elongated profile and no finger grooves
